title: Pentacalia jalcana
taxonomy: Pentacalia jalcana is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Mexico. The plant is classified within the genus Pentacalia, which is a group of flowering plants commonly found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. Pentacalia jalcana specifically belongs to the tribe Senecioneae within the Asteraceae family. The classification of Pentacalia jalcana is further refined by its specific epithet, jalcana, which is a nod to its geographic distribution.
